criteriaResults.criterion: ThemeContext provides theme state (light/dark/system) with toggle function
criteriaResults.evidence: ThemeContext.tsx defines Theme = 'light' | 'dark' | 'system' and exposes theme + setTheme via ThemeProvider and useTheme hook

criteriaResults.criterion: Theme persists to localStorage and loads on app initialization
criteriaResults.evidence: ThemeProvider uses useLocalStorage('theme', 'system') which reads from/writes to localStorage

criteriaResults.criterion: System theme option respects OS prefers-color-scheme preference
criteriaResults.evidence: ThemeContext checks matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)') when theme='system', with live change listener

criteriaResults.criterion: SidebarContext provides collapsed state with toggle function
criteriaResults.evidence: SidebarContext.tsx provides isCollapsed, toggle(), and setCollapsed() via SidebarProvider and useSidebar hook

criteriaResults.criterion: Sidebar collapsed state persists to localStorage
ToastContext provides showToast function accepting message, type (success/error/info)
criteriaResults.evidence: ToastContext.tsx defines ToastType = 'success' | 'error' | 'info' and provides showToast(message, type) via useToast hook

criteriaResults.criterion: ToastContext manages toast queue with auto-dismiss after 3 seconds
criteriaResults.evidence: useState<Toast[]> for queue, setTimeout with 3000ms for auto-dismiss

criteriaResults.criterion: DataContext provides projects, tasks, team data with useReducer
criteriaResults.evidence: DataContext.tsx uses useReducer with DataState { projects, tasks, team } and exposes via useData hook

criteriaResults.criterion: DataContext actions: ADD_PROJECT, UPDATE_PROJECT, DELETE_PROJECT, ADD_TASK, UPDATE_TASK, DELETE_TASK, MOVE_TASK
criteriaResults.evidence: All 7 action types defined in DataAction union type and handled in dataReducer switch statement

criteriaResults.criterion: DataContext syncs state to localStorage on every change
criteriaResults.evidence: useEffect with [state] dependency writes JSON.stringify(state) to localStorage key 'appData'

criteriaResults.criterion: useLocalStorage hook provides useState-like API with localStorage sync
criteriaResults.evidence: Returns [T, setter] tuple, supports updater functions, reads from localStorage on init, syncs via useEffect

criteriaResults.criterion: useClickOutside hook detects clicks outside a ref element
criteriaResults.evidence: Listens to mousedown/touchstart, checks ref.current.contains(), calls handler when outside

criteriaResults.criterion: useFocusTrap hook traps focus within modal/panel when active
criteriaResults.evidence: Queries focusable elements, focuses first on activation, wraps Tab/Shift+Tab between first and last elements

criteriaResults.criterion: useDebounce hook returns debounced value with configurable delay
criteriaResults.evidence: Uses setTimeout with cleanup, accepts value and delay params, returns debounced value

criteriaResults.criterion: All contexts wrapped in App.tsx providers hierarchy
criteriaResults.evidence: App.tsx nests ThemeProvider > SidebarProvider > ToastProvider > DataProvider > BrowserRouter > Routes
tsc --noEmit clean, vite build succeeds, HTTP 200, all 14 Playwright tests pass

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. TypeScript compiles clean, production build succeeds, and all 14 Playwright E2E tests pass (5.2s). Implementation follows HOW.md patterns correctly.
